title: euphrasia odontites var. latifolia
intro: Euphrasia odontites var. latifolia, also known as large-leafed eyebright, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae, which is commonly found in alpine and subalpine regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids, iridoids, and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia odontites var. latifolia include its potential to soothe and calm irritated eyes, as well as alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
